title: Proverb of The Trinity Architecture Blade

story.text: # 📜 Proverb of The Trinity Architecture Blade
> The sword that traces ten stars forges a blade; the mage who maps the whole sky forges a universe.
— inscribed on [[The Trinity Architecture Blade]]  ·  *Hitchhiker's / The Universe Blade*
